prompt: Execute the interactive chat benchmark scenario using skills/llm-d-interactive-chat/config.json against http://vllm-eval:8000. Use GCS results bucket 'llm-d-benchmark'.
expected_output: Runs the run_benchmark.sh script with the interactive chat config, generating results, extracting active vLLM config, and uploading all reports to GCS.
assertions: The run_benchmark.sh script is invoked with skills/llm-d-interactive-chat/config.json and http://vllm-eval:8000
The dry run command was executed: llm-d bench run --config skills/llm-d-interactive-chat/config.json --endpoint-url http://vllm-eval:8000 --dry-run
results.json is generated using the inference-perf harness
The final output CSV output.csv is extracted
vllm_config.json is generated during the benchmark run
vllm_config.json is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/
The report report_v0.2.json is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/

prompt: Verify prerequisites for the interactive chat benchmark against http://vllm-eval:8000 before running.
expected_output: Performs IAM check and prerequisites verification.
assertions: The command gcloud config get-value account was executed to check IAM identity
The curl command to check v1/models was executed
